abstract: The National Stock Exchange of India (NSE) has presented Nifty 50 Shariah and Nifty 500 Shariah indices to provide unconventional indices for Sharia-compliant companies. These indices follow Sharia laws and can be used in portfolios for investors who do not wish to put their money into undesired businesses. NSE witnessed large movements in the indices during the Covid-19 period, and this study investigates the dependency structure between the Shariah indices and their underlying indices during that period.
notes: English abstract excerpt from a finance article with strong Islamic finance vocabulary.

abstract: An animal's ability to navigate an olfactory environment depends on the activities of first-order olfactory receptor neurons. This study examines how olfactory information is encoded in Drosophila melanogaster larvae and how chemical and optogenetic stimulation of the larvae affects navigational behavior. The work focuses on odor responses, receptor-neuron activity, and behavior-level consequences in larval navigation experiments.
notes: English abstract excerpt centered on Drosophila, olfactory neurons, and behavior.

abstract: This study analyzes the optimization of Cash Waqf Linked Sukuk issuance and its potential contribution to Indonesia's economic recovery after the Covid-19 pandemic. The discussion uses qualitative descriptive analysis and SWOT to identify internal and external factors affecting cash waqf, sukuk, Islamic social finance, and entrepreneurship-oriented recovery strategies.

expected_journal.title: Review of Islamic Social Finance and Entrepreneurship

notes: English abstract excerpt with cash waqf, sukuk, and Islamic social finance themes.

abstract: Latar belakang penelitian ini adalah kepuasan pasien yang dipengaruhi oleh prosedur pelayanan pendaftaran, pelayanan sumber daya manusia, pelayanan obat, dan fasilitas. Tujuan penelitian adalah mengetahui faktor yang mempengaruhi kepuasan pasien peserta Jaminan Kesehatan Nasional terkait mutu pelayanan rumah sakit. Metode yang digunakan adalah mixed methods dengan desain sequential explanatory untuk menilai mutu pelayanan dan pengalaman pasien di Indonesia.
notes: Indonesian abstract excerpt focused on patient satisfaction and health-service quality.

abstract: Satuan kerja rekayasa enjiniring dan manufaktur bertanggung jawab atas keandalan fasilitas angkutan batubara dan peralatan fabrikasi. Mesin potong plat yang menjadi bagian penting dari proses fabrikasi sering mengalami kerusakan pada beberapa komponen sehingga target KPI tidak tercapai. Penelitian ini bertujuan menentukan interval preventive maintenance dengan pendekatan RCM dan analisis FMECA untuk menekan downtime dan biaya perawatan.

expected_journal.title: Jurnal Teknik Industri: Jurnal Hasil Penelitian dan Karya Ilmiah dalam Bidang Teknik Industri
expected_journal.publisher: Universitas Islam Negeri Sultan Syarif Kasim

notes: Indonesian abstract excerpt for industrial engineering and maintenance planning.
